block_overview: The APB_UART is a Universal Asynchronous Receiver/Transmitter (UART) block with an APB slave interface for register access. It provides a serial communication channel in SoC designs, supporting full-duplex UART communication, programmable baud rate, configurable data frame format, and hardware flow control. The block is targeted at applications requiring low-speed serial data communication with external peripherals such as GPS modules, Bluetooth chips, and debug consoles. It operates in a single clock domain driven by pclk.

features.name: APB Slave Interface
features.description: AMBA APB v2.0 compliant slave interface with 32-bit data bus for register read/write access

subfeatures.name: APB Protocol Compliance
subfeatures.description: Compliant with AMBA APB Protocol Specification v2.0

subfeatures.name: 32-bit Data Bus
subfeatures.description: Supports 32-bit wide read and write data transfers

subfeatures.name: No Wait States
subfeatures.description: Register reads complete with no wait states

features.name: UART Transmitter
features.description: Full-featured UART TX path with 8-entry FIFO, configurable data bits, stop bits, parity, and interrupt support

subfeatures.name: TX FIFO
subfeatures.description: 8-entry deep TX FIFO

subfeatures.name: Configurable Data Bits
subfeatures.description: Selectable data width: 5, 6, 7, or 8 bits

subfeatures.name: Configurable Stop Bits
subfeatures.description: Selectable stop bits: 1 or 2

subfeatures.name: Parity Support
subfeatures.description: Optional parity: even, odd, or none

subfeatures.name: TX Interrupt
subfeatures.description: Interrupt on TX FIFO empty or programmable threshold

features.name: UART Receiver
features.description: Full-featured UART RX path with 8-entry FIFO, error detection (overrun, framing, parity), break detection, and interrupt support

subfeatures.name: RX FIFO
subfeatures.description: 8-entry deep RX FIFO

subfeatures.name: Error Detection
subfeatures.description: Overrun, framing, and parity error detection

subfeatures.name: RX Interrupt
subfeatures.description: Interrupt on RX FIFO full or programmable threshold

subfeatures.name: Break Detection
subfeatures.description: Detection of UART break condition

features.name: Baud Rate Generator
features.description: Programmable baud rate via 16-bit divisor register; supports standard baud rates up to 115200 bps

subfeatures.name: 16-bit Divisor Register
subfeatures.description: Programmable baud rate via 16-bit divisor

subfeatures.name: Clock Source
subfeatures.description: Baud rate derived from system clock pclk

features.name: Hardware Flow Control
features.description: RTS/CTS hardware flow control with auto-RTS/CTS mode

subfeatures.name: RTS Output
subfeatures.description: Request to Send output signal (active-low)

subfeatures.name: CTS Input
subfeatures.description: Clear to Send input signal (active-low)

subfeatures.name: Auto-RTS/CTS
subfeatures.description: Automatic hardware flow control mode supported

features.name: Interrupts
features.description: Individual and combined interrupt outputs for TX FIFO, RX FIFO, and error conditions

subfeatures.name: TX FIFO Empty Interrupt
subfeatures.description: Interrupt asserted when TX FIFO is empty

subfeatures.name: RX FIFO Threshold Interrupt
subfeatures.description: Interrupt asserted when RX FIFO reaches threshold

subfeatures.name: Error Interrupt
subfeatures.description: Interrupt for framing, parity, and overrun errors

subfeatures.name: Combined Interrupt
subfeatures.description: Single combined interrupt output (OR of all sources)

parameters.name: FIFO_DEPTH
parameters.description: TX and RX FIFO depth (number of entries)

parameters.name: BAUD_DIVISOR_W
parameters.description: Width of baud rate divisor register

operating_modes.name: Normal Mode
operating_modes.description: Full-duplex UART TX and RX with FIFO

operating_modes.name: Loopback Mode
operating_modes.description: Internal loopback — TX connected to RX internally

operating_modes.name: Flow Control Mode
operating_modes.configuration: Enable auto-RTS/CTS in control register ⚠️ NEEDS_REVIEW

operating_modes.name: Interrupt Mode
operating_modes.description: Interrupts enabled; CPU notified on TX/RX events
operating_modes.configuration: Enable interrupt mask bits in interrupt enable register ⚠️ NEEDS_REVIEW

operating_modes.name: Polling Mode
operating_modes.description: Interrupts disabled; software polls status registers
operating_modes.configuration: Disable interrupt mask bits; poll status register ⚠️ NEEDS_REVIEW

compliance_standards.notes: Serial communication framing and baud rate compliance; specific version not cited in spec

known_constraints: Maximum supported baud rate is 115200 bps when pclk = 50 MHz
TX and RX FIFOs share the same depth parameter (FIFO_DEPTH); they cannot be independently sized
No DMA interface supported in this version (v1.0)
pslverr is always driven low — no error response supported in v1.0

needs_review.note: Register map is absent from the spec. Control register bit names and addresses for Loopback, Flow Control, Interrupt, and Polling modes are unknown.
RS-232 standard version is not cited in the spec. Confirm applicable standard version.
The spec describes interrupt outputs but does not document the interrupt enable/mask register structure needed for full interrupt verification planning.
Spec states no wait states on reads but does not fully document pready behaviour on writes or back-to-back transfers.
TX and RX FIFO threshold interrupt is mentioned but it is unclear whether the threshold is fixed, parameterised, or register-programmable.
